name: Pacoima Pawn Center / Shop
description_short: Pacoima Pawn Center is a pawn shop on Van Nuys Blvd offering jewelry, gold, and collateral-based loans with staff known for transparency in buying and selling transactions.
description_long:
Pacoima Pawn Center / Shop operates as a traditional pawn establishment located at 13660 Van Nuys Blvd in Pacoima, California. The business serves the local community by providing pawn services, which allow customers to borrow money using personal items as collateral or to sell items directly to the shop. The business has been reviewed on multiple platforms and maintains a presence on the Wheree directory, though the owner has not yet completed verification of the business profile.

The shop specializes in jewelry and gold transactions, with customer reviews indicating that staff members like Sam and Art handle buying and selling of these items. The store also carries camera lenses and other used items available for pawning or purchase. Service options include in-store shopping, same-day delivery, and onsite services. The business accepts multiple payment methods including credit cards, debit cards, and NFC mobile payments, with WiFi available for customers.

Customers consistently praise the friendliness and professionalism of staff members, with specific appreciation for transparent communication during transactions. The shop's convenient location on Van Nuys Blvd makes it accessible to local shoppers, and reviews note a welcoming atmosphere that helps customers feel comfortable conducting business. The diverse product variety—particularly in jewelry categories—is highlighted as a strength by multiple reviewers.

However, the business faces some criticism regarding pricing consistency and transparency. Several customers reported concerns about perceived upcharges on items sold and inconsistencies in how rates are communicated. Some reviewers felt that prices charged were higher than market value, particularly for gold and jewelry transactions. While the overall rating reflects "Very good" performance (8.1/10), attention to consistent rate communication and pricing clarity could enhance customer trust and satisfaction further.
pros: Staff members (Sam and Art) provide transparent information about gold and jewelry buying/selling processes
Convenient location on Van Nuys Blvd in Pacoima with accessible parking and easy access
Accepts multiple payment methods including credit cards, debit cards, and NFC mobile payments
Offers same-day delivery service on purchased items
Wide variety of jewelry and specialty items available for pawning or purchase
Friendly and professional staff create welcoming atmosphere for new and returning customers
Provides WiFi and comfortable in-store shopping experience
cons: Customer reports of inconsistent pricing communication and perceived upcharges on sold items
Some reviewers felt rates charged were higher than market value for gold and jewelry
Business owner has not completed verification process on the Wheree platform
Mixed reviews regarding consistency in how transactions are handled across different interactions
best_for: Local Pacoima residents needing quick cash through collateral-based loans
Jewelry and gold sellers seeking fair market assessment from knowledgeable staff
Customers looking for used jewelry purchases at pawn shop pricing
diagnosis: Pacoima Pawn Center is best suited for local residents and visitors needing fast cash via collateral loans or seeking to buy/sell jewelry and gold items. The main caveat is that customer reviews indicate inconsistent pricing communication and potential upcharges—shoppers should clarify rates upfront and compare offers before transacting.
services: Pawn loans using jewelry and personal items as collateral
Gold and precious metal buying and selling
In-store shopping for used vintage items
